name: What happens if the same person, brand, or product appears under different names?

mainEntity.name: What happens if the same person, brand, or product appears under different names?

acceptedAnswer.text: If your data contains multiple names for the same thing, you need alias handling and entity resolution rules. Without those rules, the graph will fragment one real-world entity into several nodes and weaken search and reporting accuracy.
acceptedAnswer.description: You need alias and entity-resolution rules or the same thing will split into multiple nodes.

description: You need alias and entity-resolution rules or the same thing will split into multiple nodes.
